metadata.description: Block direct Write/Edit/MultiEdit to ~/.claude/rules/ and route changes through the source-of-truth claude-rules repo.

plugins.name: claude-rules-source-guard
plugins.description: PreToolUse(Write|Edit) hook that blocks edits under ~/.claude/rules/ (managed as directory symlinks from kawaz/claude-rules{,-emeradaco,-zunsystem,-syun}). Reports the resolved source path so edits go to the repo, not the symlink target.
